SunlightSensor.initSunlight: Initialises the Grove Sunlight Sensor (SI1145 or SI1151) via I2C. Must be called once at startup.
SunlightSensor.getHalfWord_Visible: Returns the current visible light level.
SunlightSensor.getHalfWordUV: Returns the UV index. Directly measured on SI1145, calculated from IR and visible channels on SI1151.
